lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How can I help Skrach?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Skrach! He'd be un-frozen in a jiffy if he just had some Jubbly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And once again, but in English this time?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Sorry...Skrach, being an ogre likes Chompies, and a real delicacy is Jubbly Chompy bird. Do you think you could get some?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'm sure I can get some Jubbly Chompy.

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: That's the spirit!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok then, what's involved...how do I get this Jubbly chompy?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Ah, well, that's where it breaks down a bit you see. The only 'thing' alive which might help you get the Jubbly Chompy is the most confusing beast that Gielinor has ever known.

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: The situation is lost I am afraid and I understand totally if you decide not to help Skrach.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh come on...it can't be that difficult..

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: I'm afraid it is. You see...you need to go and speak to an Ogre called Rantz over in the Feldip hills.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ahh right...I see..

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: How do you feel about getting Jubbly Chompy now and freeing Skrach?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No way am I going to talk to Rantz.

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: I quite understand...

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: I really do...

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: There's no excuse for him really...

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Poor old Skrach...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh Ok then, I guess I'll talk to Rantz.

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Well, I do pity you, and wish you the best of luck!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nah, leave that Ogre in the frozen dimension!

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Alas, I can certainly relate to what you say. However, he deserves to be set free, the same as everyone else.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What should I do now to help Skrach?

lines.speaker: Fortuneteller
lines.text: Skrach needs Jubbly chompy in order to be unfrozen, you'll need to talk to Rantz about how to get that. Perhaps the cook can be more helpful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can we talk about what happened in the dining room?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Wow! You were incredible! The way you defeated the Culinaromancer, you made it seem so easy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So... I don't suppose you can remember how I defeated him can you?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Of course! Which bit can't you remember doing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just remind me again how I managed to unfreeze Skrach?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Certainly. Everyone knows that Skrach loves Jubbly Chompy, preferably roasted on a spit! The bird's carcass is so big, it can't be cooked any other way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And how do I get one of those?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: I wouldn't know much about that, but I believe you talked to Rantz quite a bit over in the Feldip hills. Apparently, he got you to do him quite a few favours before you actually got the Jubbly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yeah... I remember now...

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Did you want a reminder on any other of your brave exploits?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey deyr, t'anks for da chompy, it was scrumbly!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm trying to free Skrach, can you help?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Skrach...he big boss? Skrach like da Jubbly chompy...is bestest yums like chompy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, so can you help me get some Jubbly Chompy?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Rantz tell creature hows to stick da Jubbly...just like da Chompy...

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Soon, creature be da ogre too like Rantz! Harr, har, har!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A nice thought, but unlikely...

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: But creature do Rantz stuffsies first...yous creature gets Rantz to other lands over 'der so Rantz gets da stuffsies for da glugs-glugs.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Yous do dis creature for da Jubbly?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's involved?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: You's creature gets Rantz to other lands over 'der so Rantz gets da stuffsies for da glug-glugs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I get in return?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Me's shows da creatures how to sneaky, sneaky stick da Jubbly!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll do it.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Dat's da good fing, you's creature goes down by da watery place, over near da cabbage! Me's says more der'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, will do!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No way am I doing that!

sections.title: Talking to Rantz after refusing to help him

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey deyr, t'anks for da chompy, it was scrumbly!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm trying to free Skrach, can you help?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: You's creatures says dis before! Skrach big boss? Skrach like da Jubbly chompy...is bestest yums like chompy.

sections.title: Talking to Rantz near his cave after agreeing to help him

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey deyr, t'anks for da chompy, it was scrumbly!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm trying to free Skrach, can you help?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Dat's da good fing, you's creature goes down by da watery place, over near da cabbage! Me's says more der'.

sections.title: Talking to Rantz near the large tree

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, here I am...I guess this is the watery place? What now?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: You's creatures says what Rantz need for da going over da big water to da over'der place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, so you want to go to Karamja...hmmmm, it's a bit of a long walk. You'd probably be better off with a boat!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Is what me's says...you's creature no helpsies...just says Rantz saysies back!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ohhhh...sorry! Ok, for a boat you'll need something that floats in order to make a hull.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Uh rocksie?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Close!... But perhaps a tree would be better?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Me finks me has found one...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...very good...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me how to get Jubbly now?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: You's creatures not done for Rantz fingies yet! Da boatsie is da guddun...will carry rantz to da over place?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You can't use that as a boat! The roots are still hanging off it.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Ok, you's creature makes it better!

sections.title: Talking to Rantz after trimming the log's roots

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Now can you please tell me how to get Jubbly?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Creatures not done yet! Da boatsie not good for da stuffsies! Da stuffsies for da glug-glugs goes in da watery stuffs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, yes, you've got no space to put anything in there... it needs to be hollowed out a bit.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Ok, you's creature makes it better!

sections.title: Talking to Rantz after hollowing out the boat

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, the boat's ready, now tell me how to get a Jubbly.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Yous do other stuffsies for Rantz first. We's needs da bestest groundy for da walking on new land.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bestest groundy? New land?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Rantz use stabbie chucker and stick da dirt for da over der' place. You's creature make da chompy by da stabber so Fycie and Bugs sniffs da bestest yumms and splosh over wiv da boatsie!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Ok you's person...goes find da stabber!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please, can you just show me how to catch a Jubbly!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Creatures not done Rantz stuffsies yet!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, what do you need me to do now?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Rantz done used da stabbie chucker and stock da dirt for da over der' place. You's creature make da chompy by da stabber so Fycie and Bugs sniffs da bestest yumms and splosh over wiv da boatsie!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: You's creature...goes to da over der' place and cook da chompy by da stabber!

sections.title: After cooking the chompy on the beach

lines.speaker: Bugs
lines.text: Hey there...we's could smell da Chompy from ages back...it smells lish!

lines.speaker: Bugs
lines.text: Dad says you can get a lift back with us if you want?

lines.speaker: Bugs
lines.text: Dad says you can get a free lift back with us if you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please, I'll get a lift back with you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

sections.title: Talking to Rantz after arriving on the ogre boat

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, now tell me how to get Jubbly!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: What's creature's say?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've helped with your scheme to get over to Karamja, now help me by telling me how to get Jubbly!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Ohhh, get's Jubbly...dat's da easy fing...you's creature is a bit stoopid for not know dat!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just tell me!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Okays creature's keeps hairsies on...

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Ok then you's creature...you's use da big blowers on da fatsie toady. Creature makes da fatsie toady and den needs da rocksie an da wooly fing to stick it down da ground.

sections.title: Attempting to use an iron spit on a raw jubbly

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I saw some large static ogre spits near Jiggig and Rantz. Perhaps I can cook this jubbly meat there?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Good work adventurer, I've teleported them away to safety! You only have [number] council members left to protect!
